title: Community Moderation Update
body:
Today's moderation actions:

• Banned spam_wave_42 for mass phishing link posting
• Banned toxic_runner for targeted harassment of newcomers
• Warned new_member_17 for off-topic content in #introductions
• Warned bot_like_user_77 for suspicious automated behavior
• Protected trusted members from false reports

Thank you for helping keep our community safe!
